title: Every Outfit Kendall Jenner Wears in a Week | 7 Days, 7 Looks | Vogue India

questions.question: What does Kendall mean when she says she 'can't leave the house or a hotel without a pair of sunglasses'?
options: A) She is allergic to sunlight
B) She feels incomplete or unsafe without them
C) She only wears them at night
D) She collects sunglasses as a hobby
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第66.0s-71.9s的内容，Kendall说：'I just feel safe behind them or something'，意思是她没有太阳镜就会觉得缺少安全感，这是一种心理依赖。

questions.question: What does 'vintage' mean in the context of Kendall's Gucci sunglasses?
options: B) Old but valuable or classic
questions.explanation: 字幕第71.9s-77.0s提到'vintage Gucci'，vintage在这里指复古的、有年代感的经典款式，通常是二手或早期生产的正品。

questions.question: What does 'form-fitting' refer to in Kendall's description of her outfits?
questions.explanation: 字幕第425.5s-431.0s提到'form-fitting'，第463.8s-469.1s也提到'super form fitting'，意思是紧身的、贴合身体曲线的服装版型。

questions.question: What brand are the 'Kate' jeans that Kendall mentions as her favorite?
questions.explanation: 字幕第307.3s-314.3s明确提到：'they're the Kate jeans so these are Levi's 501s'，说明Kate jeans是Levi's 501的款式。

questions.question: Which designer brand does Kendall mention multiple times as one of her favorites?
questions.explanation: 字幕第476.3s-480.2s提到'Bottega'，第25条字幕443.8s-448.5s也提到'I love Bottega right now they're one of my favorite Italian designers'，Bottega是Kendall非常喜欢的品牌。

questions.question: What does 'get it twisted' mean in Kendall's airport look description?
options: A) Get confused about clothing choices
B) Don't misunderstand or get the wrong idea
questions.explanation: 字幕第272.0s-277.1s提到'don't get it twisted'，这是一个常用口语表达，意思是'别搞错了'或'别误解'，Kendall用这个词提醒大家不要误解她穿leggings的做法。

questions.question: What kind of outfit does Kendall wear for her workout day according to the video?
options: B) Running shoes and a dress
C) Gym shoes and a sweatshirt for Pilates
questions.explanation: 字幕第519.5s-526.3s提到：'this is my going to Pilates look I guess I'd add a sweatshirt'，以及第508.3s-514.1s提到'workout day'，说明她的锻炼日穿搭是运动鞋和运动衫。

questions.question: What is Kendall's airport look according to the video?
options: A) High heels and a dress
questions.explanation: 字幕第277.1s-282.1s提到'am not wearing these jeans on the airplane I always have a pair of leggings in my carry-on'，以及第286.5s-291.2s说'my leggings on the actual plane'，说明她的机场穿搭以舒适为主，会穿leggings。

questions.question: Which brand is 'The Row' described as in the video?
options: B) Kendall's favorite brand she wears all the time
questions.explanation: 字幕第172.1s-185.3s提到'something this coat which is the row shocker that's all I wear'，第554.8s-567.0s也提到'again the row'，说明The Row是Kendall经常穿的品牌。

questions.question: What does Kendall say about the Levi's 501 jeans she tailored?
options: A) They were too small originally
B) They were huge on her when she got them
C) They were already the perfect fit
D) She didn't like the color
questions.explanation: 字幕第298.9s-302.9s提到'were huge on me when I got them and I tailored them to fit me just once again'，意思是这些牛仔裤最初很大，她改过之後合身。

questions.question: What type of bag does Kendall describe as a 'good slouchy tote bag goes with literally everything'?
options: B) A designer tote from The Row
questions.explanation: 字幕第554.8s-567.0s提到'again the row and it's just a good slouchy tote bag goes with literally everything'，说明这是一款The Row的慵懒托特包。

questions.question: What does 'errands' refer to in the everyday look description?
options: B) Running various daily tasks like shopping and appointments
questions.explanation: 字幕第16.4s-22.6s提到'running errands running around town look'，errands是指日常琐事，如购物、办事等。

questions.question: Which designer jacket does Kendall mention wearing in the video?
options: C) Ralph Lauren vintage jacket from 2018
questions.explanation: 字幕第291.2s-298.9s提到'Ralph Lauren jacket from 2018 vintage tea'，是一款复古的Ralph Lauren夹克。

questions.question: What does 'snatched waist' mean in Kendall's description?
options: B) A very defined, slim waistline that accentuates the figure
questions.explanation: 字幕第431.0s-436.7s提到'love a little snatched waist'，snatched waist是时尚术语，指非常紧致、凸显身材的腰线设计。

questions.question: What kind of shoes does Kendall say she wears 'all the time' according to the video?
questions.explanation: 字幕第121.5s-127.4s提到'see me in these boots all the time this throw bag is again just a good basic'，以及第115.7s-121.5s提到'vintage Gucci boots'，说明她经常穿Gucci靴子。

questions.question: What is Kendall's 'night out' look typically like?
options: B) Form-fitting and cute from Bottega
questions.explanation: 字幕第480.2s-484.7s提到'night out to a birthday party or a friend's dinner'，第431.0s-436.7s提到'love a little snatched waist the whole look is Bottega'，说明她的夜店造型是Bottega的紧身款式。

questions.question: What does 'uniform' refer to in Kendall's description of her everyday style?
options: B) Her regular, repeated outfit formula
questions.explanation: 字幕第162.8s-167.1s提到'this is a uniform for me again'，uniform在这里指她日常重复穿着的固定穿搭公式，而非真正的制服。

questions.question: What feature of the boots does Kendall particularly like according to the video?
options: B) They go up to the knee with a small heel
questions.explanation: 字幕第314.3s-319.1s提到'High they go up to the knee but have a small little heel which is my favorite'，说明她喜欢高到膝盖、有小跟的靴子。

questions.question: What does 'forward' refer to in the context of the video?
options: B) A fashion retailer or website
questions.explanation: 字幕第463.8s-469.1s提到'I got this whole look on forward'，第32条字幕也提到'I work for forward'，Forward是一个时尚电商平台。

questions.question: Describe your everyday style and the key pieces in your wardrobe. What brands do you prefer and why?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生用英语描述自己的日常穿搭风格、衣橱必备单品以及偏好的品牌。
questions.referenceAnswer: Should include: 1) Description of everyday style 2) Key wardrobe pieces (jeans, t-shirts, etc.) 3) Preferred brands and reasons 4) Comfort vs fashion balance
questions.hint: Think about: What do you typically wear? What are your must-have items? Which brands do you like and why?

questions.question: What would you wear for a workout or exercise session? Describe your ideal gym outfit.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生描述运动时的穿搭选择，包括运动鞋、运动服等单品。
questions.referenceAnswer: Should include: 1) Type of exercise (Pilates, gym, running, etc.) 2) Key clothing items (sneakers, leggings, sports bra, sweatshirt) 3) Comfort and functionality considerations 4) Brand preferences if any
questions.hint: Consider: What activities do you do? What do you wear? Why is comfort important for workout?

questions.question: Describe your perfect airport look. What factors do you consider when choosing outfits for travel?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生描述理想的机场穿搭，并解释选择服装时考虑的因素。
questions.referenceAnswer: Should include: 1) Comfortable clothing choices (leggings, loose tops, etc.) 2) Practical considerations for travel 3) Accessories (sunglasses, etc.) 4) Balance between comfort and style
questions.hint: Think about: What makes a good travel outfit? Why is comfort important on planes? What do you typically pack?

questions.question: If you were going to a birthday party or a fancy dinner, what would you wear? Describe your night out outfit.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生描述参加生日派对或正式晚餐的穿搭选择。
questions.referenceAnswer: Should include: 1) Type of event (birthday party, dinner, etc.) 2) Outfit choices (dress, form-fitting clothes, heels or boots) 3) Accessories (bag, jewelry) 4) Brand preferences
questions.hint: Consider: What's the occasion? Do you prefer dresses or outfits? What shoes would you wear?

questions.question: What is Kendall's 'everyday kind of' look mentioned at the beginning of the video?
options: B) A little black tee with jeans
questions.explanation: 字幕第1.2s-16.4s提到'hey Vogue I'm Kendall Jenner and this is so this I'd say is my everyday kind of'，第16.4s-22.6s具体描述为'running errands running around town look I am wearing a little black tee by Sunday's best my jeans'，所以她的日常造型是黑色T恤搭配牛仔裤。
